title: Suport format param for varlink Commit
body:
We need to pass the image format OCI or docker  in the varlink commit command.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
You'll want to run 'make gofmt' to fix the indenting. also running 'make lint' never hurts :)
LGTM, assuming tests are green.  Thanks for not breaking the API.
Code LGTM, but I wouild like an ack from @jwhonce to make sure this doesn't break pypodman
And there we go... Good to merge IMO. Going to wait for travis.
